# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.10.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
- name: app-router
  type: compute.v1.router
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    bgp:
      asn: 64514
- name: app-nat
  type: compute.v1.routerNat
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    router: $(ref.app-router.name)
    natIpAllocateOption: AUTO_ONLY
    sourceSubnetworkIpRangesToNat: LIST_OF_SUBNETWORKS
    subnetworks:
    - name: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
      sourceIpRangesToNat:
      - ALL_IP_RANGES
    minPortsPerVm: 128
    tcpEstablishedIdleTimeoutSec: 1200
    udpIdleTimeoutSec: 30
    icmpIdleTimeoutSec: 30
- name: allow-health-check
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "8080"
    targetTags:
    - app-backend
- name: allow-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"
    targetTags:
    - app-backend
- name: app-private-service-range
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    purpose: VPC_PEERING
    addressType: INTERNAL
    prefixLength: 16
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
- name: app-servicenetworking-connection
  type: servicenetworking.v1.services.connections
  properties:
    parent: services/servicenetworking.googleapis.com
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    reservedPeeringRanges:
    - $(ref.app-private-service-range.name)
- name: app-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: $(env.project)-app-bucket
    location: US
    uniformBucketLevelAccess:
      enabled: true
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
- name: app-sql
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_15
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-1-3840
      availabilityType: ZONAL
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"
    deletionProtectionEnabled: false
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - app-servicenetworking-connection
- name: app-db
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-sql.name)
    name: appdb
- name: app-db-user
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-sql.name)
    name: appuser
    password: ChangeMe-StrongPassword123!
- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: e2-medium
      tags:
        items:
        - app-backend
      networkInterfaces:
      - subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
      disks:
      - boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
          diskSizeGb: 20
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -euo pipefail
            apt-get update
            apt-get install -y nginx
            cat >/var/www/html/index.html <<'EOF'
            <html><body><h1>GCP MVP Backend</h1></body></html>
            EOF
            cat >/etc/nginx/sites-available/default <<'EOF'
            server {
              listen 8080 default_server;
              server_name _;
              root /var/www/html;
              index index.html;
            }
            EOF
            systemctl restart nginx
- name: app-mig
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    baseInstanceName: app
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    targetSize: 2
    zone: us-central1-a
    namedPorts:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
- name: app-autoscaler
  type: compute.v1.autoscaler
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    target: $(ref.app-mig.selfLink)
    autoscalingPolicy:
      minNumReplicas: 2
      maxNumReplicas: 5
      cpuUtilization:
        utilizationTarget: 0.6
      coolDownPeriodSec: 60
- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    type: HTTP
    httpHealthCheck:
      port: 8080
      requestPath: /
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 2
- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.app-mig.instanceGroup)
      balancingMode: UTILIZATION
      maxUtilization: 0.8
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL_MANAGED
- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)
- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)
- name: app-lb-ip
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    ipVersion: IPV4
- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL_MANAGED
    portRange: "80"
    IPProtocol: TCP
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
    ipAddress: $(ref.app-lb-ip.address)
outputs:
- name: loadBalancerIp
  value: $(ref.app-lb-ip.address)
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.app-bucket.name)
- name: sqlInstanceConnectionName
  value: $(ref.app-sql.connectionName)
- name: vpcNetwork
  value: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
- name: subnetwork
  value: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
